name: alonso-skills/arm-bandits-expert
summary: Implements, evaluates, and deploys multi-armed bandit algorithms — including Thompson Sampling, UCB, epsilon-greedy, LinUCB, EXP3, and contextual bandits. Covers algorithm selection, experiment harnesses, offline evaluation (IPS, Doubly Robust), infrastructure patterns, and correctness verification. Use when the user asks about multi-armed bandits, exploration-exploitation tradeoffs, adaptive experiments, A/B testing alternatives, online optimization, bandit-based recommendation or personalization systems, or contextual bandits.
